package rulecoverage

func NegativeRangeOverStringByIndex() string {
    ruleID := "range_over_string_by_index"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`for i := 0; i < len(s); i++ { c := s[i] }` on strings that should iterate runes"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
